source_span: An unauthenticated attacker can craft requests that bypass all route-level authentication checks.
what_changed: a condition was described in the advisory in which requests bypass route-level authentication checks
uncertainty_note: The span names a vulnerability class, not an attributable actor. 'Attacker' is an inference from the CVE framing, not from the span itself. The span describes a condition (requests that bypass checks) without naming a source agent. Source left blank: the span does not support confident actor attribution.

source_span: An authentication bypass vulnerability exists in the token validation middleware of fastmiddleware.
what_changed: the CVE advisory document described an authentication bypass condition in fastmiddleware's token validation middleware
uncertainty_note: The original extraction treats 'cve-2026-44228' as an acting agent with the power to 'enter a dependency chain' and 'threaten customer data'. The span does not support this framing. CVE-2026-44228 is an identifier — a document reference — not an actor with agency. The span describes a condition in the middleware, not an action by the CVE record. Reframed: the source here is the advisory document that described the condition, not the condition itself as an agent.
